title: SASC Advances 185 Military Nominations a...
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 185 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 185 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force. The committee also voted by voice to report out favorably the nomination of Dr. Patricia L. Lee to be a Member of the Defense Nuclear Facilities Safety Board.
The list of military promotions includes 59 general officer and flag officers.
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
